name: HR_LOCATIONS_ALL_TL
query: ( SELECT "LOCATION_DETAILS_ID","EFFECTIVE_START_DATE","EFFECTIVE_END_DATE","LANGUAGE","OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER","LOCATION_CODE","LOCATION_NAME","DESCRIPTION","SOURCE_LANG","AC_LOCATION_CODE","CREATED_BY","CREATION_DATE","LAST_UPDATED_BY","LAST_UPDATE_DATE","LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN" FROM per_location_details_f_tl WHERE trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN effective_start_date and effective_end_date )
